svg.title: Implement and Test with maker, checker and architecture review agent under one corporate guardrails bracket
svg.desc: The assistant pulls the next ticket from Jira, applies maker guardrail skills including test rules, and runs the agentic loop to generate code and tests, running tests and fixing failures. Spec Kit implements, checker skills review code and coverage, then an architecture review agent assesses the output against corporate guardrails. Maker skills, checker skills and the architecture review agent all sit under one corporate guardrails bracket. Only then does the assistant report ready for review and the developer closes the Jira ticket.
svg.text: ↻ agentic loop — code, run tests, fix, repeat
you close the Jira ticket — human gate
No separate test phase — verification is continuous, within corporate guardrails:
tests run in the agentic loop, checker skills verify coverage, and the architecture review agent assesses the output before it reaches you.
